title: Senior Teacher - Chandigarh University - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Chandigarh University - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Chandigarh University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About Chandigarh University:
Chandigarh University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Chandigarh University!
